description_for_human: Independent research on enterprise AI strategy, governance, and operational risk.
description_for_model: Retrieve research papers on enterprise AI adoption, agentic risk, governance, hallucinations, measurement, and organizational design. Use /research.json to list all papers, then fetch any /research/{slug}.html for full text. Each paper is a citable practitioner report with a slug, title, summary, canonical URL, and topic tags.
